case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ALISHA ANDREWS et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ANDREWS, ALISHA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDREWS, ALISHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2176 MISSION ST. #324, S.F. CA. 94110, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS
